title: Gate live smoke tests behind env opt-in and add model-health command
problem: No safe harness exists for live Ollama runs: no pytest marker isolation, no model-health CLI, and live runs could write to the same default export dirs as golden runs. After ticket-037 enables structured tasks behind RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM, operators need explicit smoke-test gating and a health probe command.
acceptance_criteria: pytest and pytest tests/golden collect zero live smoke tests by default.
research model-health (or equivalent CLI) reports Ollama reachability without raising.
Live-mode runs cannot write apps/public-site/public/data/ without an explicit publish flag.
Safety audit unchanged or extended with smoke-gate evidence.
Golden tests and default pytest pass without Ollama.
non_goals: Do not change public export schema.
Do not remove RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM gate from ticket-037.
Do not implement ticket-039 or later.
